rulings.Case Title: WAUKEEN Q. MCCOY VS. KEN PAGE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Amend Plaintiff'S First Amended Complaint

rulings.Case Title: ORLANDO BRAVO VS. DAVID OLIVER NORDBY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 8, 2014, line 2. PLAINTIFF ORLANDO BRAVO's DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Plaintiff's Demurrer to Amended Answer is sustained. Demurrer to the seventh affirmative defense is sustained without leave to amend. No substantive opposition filed. Demurrer to the 2nd, 3rd and 4th affirmative defenses is sustained without leave to amend. No new matter is raised and defendants' contentions should be properly addressed by denials. Demurrer to the 1st affirmative defense is sustained with leave to amend to allege facts re: Plaintiff's waiver of (1) his right to an Itemized Statement; (2) his rights under 1950.5(g)(2)(B) and 1950.5(g)(3); (3) misrepresentations regarding damages. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ORLANDO BRAVO VS. DAVID OLIVER NORDBY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE AMENDED ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 8, 2014, line 2. PLAINTIFF ORLANDO BRAVO's MOTION TO STRIKE AMENDED ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Moot in part and granted in part. Motion is granted as to the request for expert fees. Motion is otherwise moot. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARK ALLEN BARNES VS. SHIRLEY HOLMES et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 8, 2014, line 5. DEFENDANT SHIRLEY HOLMES' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Defendant's Demurer to First Amended Complaint as to the 12th cause of action for retaliatory eviction is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to allege that she vacated the premises and does not assert in the opposition that such allegations can be made. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FRANCES LUNG VS. JOHN DOE et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 8, 2014, line 6. DEFENDANT CHARLES FRANK's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT GRANTED. Late-filed opposition is stricken. Hearing required to determine whether judgment is void. Plaintiff is ordered to produce declaration no later than 9:00 a.m. on December 8, 2014 with the following documents attached: 1. A copy of the "3 Day Notice" referenced in paragraph 7(a)(a) of Complaint; 2. A copy of the Proof of Service of the "3 Day Notice." 3. A copy of the written agreement entered into on or about May 1, 2013 referenced in paragraphs 6(a)-(b) of the Complaint 4. Proof of Service for Summons and Complaint filed on July 16, 2013; 5. Proof of Service for the Order amending the Complaint filed on October 22, 2014 = (501/REQ)
